creator: jmcoopr@webmail.bmi.net
text:
My normal mail server has once-again lost reverse-DNS, thus effectively 
locking me out of FreeBSD.  I receive fine, but I've had to resort to 
sending this PR on a hated WinDoze box because of the reverse-DNS issue.

Please be kind enough to CC any feedback to:

john_m_cooper@yahoo.com
jmcoopr@webmail.bmi.net

In this way, I might even be able to read it.  The normal readers of the 
sargeo account won't have a clue.  :)

Thanks.

jmc
